title: Low Cost Home Rental Listings - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Low Cost Home Rental Listings 13 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ACCESS AFFORDABLE HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Maintains a list of affordable housing providers and their rental properties. Applications and information for properties managed by ACCESS are also available. Properties may have waiting lists. 3630 Aviation Way Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 779-6691 Get Directions Visit Website More Details AFFORDABLEHOUSING.COM AFFORDABLE HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Online affordable housing listing service. Sign up for open waitlist alerts. Website Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable (866) 466-7328 Visit Website More Details HOME FORWARD AFFORDABLE HOUSING APARTMENT COMMUNITIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides permanent housing options in apartment communities, usually operated by independent property management companies. 135 SW Ash Street Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Households with income up to 80% of the Area Median Income Hours: -Varies by property -Administrative support available by phone Monday-Thursday 9am-4pm Email (503) 802-8300 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOUSING AUTHORITY OF CLACKAMAS COUNTY HOUSING AUTHORITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information, referrals, and support for landlord-tenant issues, fair housing, and complaints of housing discrimination. Maintains listings of low-income housing in Clackamas County, including non-subsidized low-cost apartments. Manages Housing Authority-owned units, subsidized rental housing, and the Section 8/Housing Choice Voucher program. Handles complaints related to public housing and Section 8. 13930 S Gain Street Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Varies by program or property Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, holiday hours posted on website Email (503) 655-8267 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOUSING AUTHORITY OF JACKSON COUNTY SUBSIDIZED AND AFFORDABLE HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides subsidized housing and affordable rental unit programs. 2251 Table Rock Road Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Subsidized housing: Individuals who are 62 and older and adults with disabilities Affordable housing: Income limits and background check status varies by property. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-4:30pm. First Thursday of the month 10am-noon and 1pm-4:30pm Email (541) 779-5785 1000 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOUSING AUTHORITY OF YAMHILL COUNTY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Housing Choice Voucher (HCV) rental assistance, including a Homeownership Voucher Program. Also offers a Family Self-Sufficiency program, Housing Rehab program, and manages several area affordable housing complexes for families, farmworkers, older adults, and people with special needs. 135 NE Dunn Place Mcminnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Varies; some programs may have residency or income requirements. Call for information. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (503) 883-4300 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST HOUSING ALTERNATIVES LOW-COST HOUSING PROPERTIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides listings of affordable housing. Please note that this agency does not administrate those properties and that is done by outside management companies. Contact information is listed on the individual pages. Eligibility: Low-income families, older adults, and people with special needs Hours: Not applicable Get Directions Visit Website More Details OUR JUST FUTURE AFFORDABLE HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates 18 properties with affordable housing units throughout East Portland and Gresham. 10550 NE Halsey Street Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Varies by property but generally are income-based Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 548-0200 Get Directions Visit Website More Details POLK COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION AFFORDABLE RENTAL HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Develops and manages affordable rental housing for low to moderate income residents. 657 Main Street Dallas, OR 97338 Eligibility: Varies by property Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (503) 831-3173 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PORTLAND COMMUNITY REINVESTMENT INITIATIVES INC AFFORDABLE HOUSING/INCOME RESTRICTED PROPERTIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides affordable rental housing for low and moderate-income households. Affordable housing means that rent is not subsidized or income-based, but rents are below fair market value. May give preference to applicants involuntarily displaced from North/Inner Northeast Portland at any time since 2000 due to increasing rents or the sale of residency property. 6329 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97211 Eligibility: Household income must be at least 1.5 times the rent amount (or hold a qualifying rental assistance voucher) and cannot exceed 60% Area Median Income for the City of Portland. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm (503) 288-2923 Get Directions Visit Website More Details REACH COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT INC REACH COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides affordable rental housing. Applicants may be waitlisted. Does not offer rental assistance or emergency housing. 4150 S Moody Avenue Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Low-income households Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-4pm Email (503) 501-5733 Get Directions Visit Website More Details RELAY RESOURCES AFFORDABLE HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides affordable and low-income rental housing. Approval of application is based on individual income and rental history. Some properties operate from a waitlist and some are available on a first-come, first-served basis. Properties outside of Multnomah County are limited. 5312 NE 148th Avenue Portland, OR 97230 Eligibility: 50%-60% or less of Area Median Income depending on property Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 223-6327 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT PORTLAND FIELD OFFICE DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides referrals and information about income-based housing through local Public Housing Authorities and other providers, Federal Housing Administration (FHA) loans, manufactured housing; and referrals to HUD-approved housing counseling agencies for foreclosure, purchase, reverse mortgage, and budgeting assistance. A list of HUD-funded housing is available online. 1220 SW 3rd Avenue Suite 400 Portland, OR 972042825 Eligibility: Income restrictions vary by program. Acceptance of rental application is at apartment manager's discretion. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm, closed federal holidays Message line: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (971) 222-2600 0 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ACCESS AFFORDABLE HOUSING HOME FORWARD AFFORDABLE HOUSING APARTMENT COMMUNITIES HOUSING AUTHORITY OF CLACKAMAS COUNTY HOUSING AUTHORITY HOUSING AUTHORITY OF JACKSON COUNTY SUBSIDIZED AND AFFORDABLE HOUSING HOUSING AUTHORITY OF YAMHILL COUNTY HOUSING AUTHORITY OF YAMHILL COUNTY OUR JUST FUTURE AFFORDABLE HOUSING POLK COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION AFFORDABLE RENTAL HOUSING PORTLAND COMMUNITY REINVESTMENT INITIATIVES INC AFFORDABLE HOUSING/INCOME RESTRICTED PROPERTIES REACH COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT INC REACH COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT RELAY RESOURCES AFFORDABLE HOUSING UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT
